title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 79.510 - County commission shall appoint trustee
text:
79.510.  County commission shall appoint trustee. — Whenever the county commission shall dissolve any such city of the fourth class, the said county commission shall appoint some competent person to act as trustee for the corporation so dissolved, and such trustee, before entering upon the discharge of his duties, shall take and subscribe an oath that he will faithfully discharge the duties of his office, and shall give bond with sufficient security, to be approved by the commission, to the use of such disincorporated city, conditioned for the faithful discharge of his duty.
(RSMo 1939 § 7217) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 7067; 1919 § 8517; 1909 § 9418
